'''Aris V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sector]] chosen as a possible base of operations for the [[Laramus Base Irregulars]] after they left [[Laramus Base]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref>

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] struck an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military target on Aris V before the [[Battle of Turak IV]], leading to an increase in operations in the Parmel sector.<ref name="Battle of Turak IV">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/sourcearchive/news20090512.html|text=The Battle of Turak IV|int=The Battle of Turak IV}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
